description: Letter from Yefet b. Menashshe Ibn al-Qaṭāʾif to one of his brothers. Fragment (upper right corner of recto). Mentions the phrase/title/name "Sar Shalom." Little else is preserved here. See PGPID 6115 and PGPID 6116 for potentially related documents.
description_he: שרידי מכתב מיפת בן מנשה אבן אל-קטאיף לאחיו, מזכיר שר שלום
